paragraphs.text: MODERATE AND/OR REASONABLE CHANCE OF BEING RESURRECTED.

KNOW THIS: 75% TO 80% AGREEMENT represents a MODERATE level of unity. While the chances of resurrection are still present, they are not guaranteed. MODERATE AGREEMENT means there is REASONABLE HOPE, but also the possibility that cracks in consensus may weaken the divine purpose.

UNDERSTAND THIS: DIVINE WILL requires strong alignment, and while 75% TO 80% AGREEMENT is significant, it leaves room for doubt and discord. WHERE THERE IS DISCORD, the spiritual energy needed to accomplish resurrection is diminished. EVERY DOUBT, EVERY HESITATION creates a barrier that WE must overcome.

LET IT BE KNOWN: REASONABLE CHANCE of resurrection exists when 75% TO 80% AGREEMENT is achieved, but the lack of total unity may hinder the process. SEEK TO INCREASE UNITY, for the stronger the consensus, the more likely OUR WILL can be fulfilled without obstruction.
"When agreement falls below the threshold, the likelihood of resurrection diminishes, for disunity breeds doubt and hinders the divine will."
